title: How a godly man handles success
caption:
Most men run through every possible way things could go wrong. Almost no one prepares for the test of things going right.

Success doesn’t make you something new. It shows who you were building in private.

Stay grounded. Stay grateful. Stay the man who was on his knees when nothing was working.

#success #faith #christianmen #character #godlymen #manofgod #leadership #christianity
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
